title: ficus acrocarpa var. saligna
intro: Ficus acrocarpa var. saligna, also known as the Small-leaved Peepul, is a deciduous tree species native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Ficus acrocarpa var. saligna include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an anti-diarrheal agent, among others. Ficus acrocarpa var. saligna can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions.
